name: THORACIC DUCT CYST
definition: exceedingly rare benign mass of posterior mediastinum

demographics.Histo: cystic space lined by hyalinized fibrous connective tissue surrounded by patchy

dominant_finding: homogeneous well-defined mass of water attenuation
discriminating_features: enhancement of a smooth thin wall
homogeneous well-defined mass of water attenuation
variable SI on T1WI; mildly hyperintense ← increased lipids + proteins

general: enhancement of a smooth thin wall
CT: homogeneous well-defined mass of water attenuation
MR: variable SI on T1WI; mildly hyperintense ← increased lipids + proteins
variously heterogeneous hyperintense mass on T2WI

clinical.Cx: rapid enlargement / spontaneous rupture after high-fat meal
clinical.Rx: resection under preservation of thoracic duct pedicles to avoid postoperative chylothorax
